summary: Completed comprehensive testing of INCEPT-1 landing page with GreenJets-inspired dark theme. All backend APIs (100% success) and frontend features verified successfully. Page loads with dark theme, green accents, PPT images from incept1 directory, functional contact form, and proper navigation.
passed_tests: Contact form validation (422 for invalid data)
Page loads with dark GreenJets theme (black background, green accents)
Navigation works with smooth scroll to all sections
Hero section displays with green accent text and CTAs
Product Showcase displays 4 labeled PPT images from /images/incept1/
Technology section displays 3 component images (Luer-Lock, Peristaltic Pump, Servo Valve)
Timeline/Journey section shows 4 chronological events with images (2023-2025)
Contact form integration with backend API working
Footer displays correct contact info: +91-9340151871 and wemakeverything@gmail.com
All PPT images load correctly from incept1 directory
Green accent styling (#2CFF95) found throughout (70+ elements)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major features working, minor hero section selector issue in one test run)
